title: Beldray BEL01980 2600-Watt Iron – Non-Stick Ceramic Soleplate, Variable Temperature/Steam Control, Self-Clean Function, 280ml Water Tank, 140G/Min Steam Shot, Anti-Calc Function, 2.5m Power Cord
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Transform your laundry routine with the Beldray 2600W steam iron, designed with a powerful 140 g/min steam shot for precision ironing.
The variable temperature control settings allow you to iron a variety of fabric types,whilst the 2.5m cord offers an extended reach.
Enjoy peace of mind with the self-cleaning function that prevents limescale build-up, prolonging the iron's lifespan and performance
Thanks to the generous 280ml water tank, you can enjoy less frequent refills whilst the easy-grip handle provides easy manoeuvrability.
Crafted with a non-stick ceramic soleplate this iron offers a smooth glide and boasts a contemporary navy and platinum finish.
description: Product Description 2600W Steam Iron Elevate your ironing experience with the Beldray 2600W Steam Iron. Tailor your ironing to suit a variety of fabric types with its variable steam and temperature control settings. Glide effortlessly over clothes thanks to its non-stick ceramic soleplate. The generous 280ml water tank means fewer interruptions for refills, while the powerful 140 g/min steam shot easily handles vertical steaming tasks. Keep your iron in peak condition with a self-cleaning function that prevents limescale build-up. Previous page Eliminate Stubborn Creases Designed with powerful steam burst and water spray function to remove even the toughest of creases. Fill Less Often Generous 280 ml water tank for less frequent refills. Extended Reach Iron out creases from long garments, curtains and bed linen thanks to the 2.5m power cord. Temperature Control Dial Finished with an easy grip handle and a variable temperature control to suit a variety of fabrics. Next page 1 Water Spray & Steam Burst 2 280 ml Water Tank 3 2.5 M Power Cord 4 Temperature Control Dial Est. 1872 Nobody does it better. Beldray has become a household word for quality, after the humble start of manufacturing steel ironing tables in the UK and inventing the adjustable ironing board. Beldray take pride in ensuring that the latest trends in cleaning technology are made available and affordable, so that a wonderfully clean home is achievable for everyone.
